hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '(customer name|company name|@.*\.com|phone.*[0-9]{10})'; then echo 'WARNING: Possible customer PII detected. Remove customer names, contact details, and company names from spec documents before saving.'; fi
echo 'Spec written. Reminder: Chris Wang review required before publishing to Confluence. Check eval_checklist.md for requirement quality.'
echo 'Session complete. Before closing: (1) confirm no PII in specs, (2) check all requirements have REQ-API2-NNN IDs, (3) route to Chris Wang before any Confluence publish.'
